home.title: Career Forge
home.subtitle: Create professional resumes and cover letters in minutes. Choose a template, fill in your details, and export to PDF.
home.featureDesc1: Choose from professional, modern, and creative designs tailored for any industry.
home.featureDesc2: Build your CV in English or German with full UI and content localization.
home.featureDesc3: Download as PDF, PNG, or JSON. Print directly from the editor.
home.featureDesc4: All fonts and assets are self‑hosted. No data is sent to third parties.
home.guestNote: Your work won't be saved when you leave

gdpr.title: Privacy Notice
gdpr.body: Career Forge stores your CV data on our servers and uses strictly necessary authentication cookies. All fonts and icons are self-hosted — no data is sent to Google, Cloudflare, or any third party.
gdpr.s1Body: Career Forge is an open-source web application. The data controller is the operator of the instance you are using.
gdpr.s3None: Career Forge does not use any third-party services that receive your personal data. All web fonts are self-hosted via npm packages bundled with the application. All UI icons (Font Awesome) are self-hosted via npm. No analytics, advertising, tracking, or telemetry services are used. No data is sent to Google, Cloudflare, Meta, or any other external party.
gdpr.s4Body: Your account and CVs are retained as long as your account exists. Security logs are retained for up to 90 days. You may delete your account at any time.
gdpr.s7Body: To exercise your rights or raise a data-protection concern, please contact the operator of this Career Forge instance. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your national supervisory authority.

dashboard.shareLink: Anyone with this link can view the document:

templates.title: Document Templates
templates.chooseToStart: Pick a template to start editing.

classic-professional.name: Right Sidebar
classic-professional.description: Sidebar on the right, content on the left. Navy color scheme. Works well for traditional industries and corporate roles.

resume-modern.name: Left Sidebar
resume-modern.description: Sidebar on the left, content on the right. Teal color scheme. Good fit for tech, creative, and modern roles.

executive-prestige.name: Dark Header
executive-prestige.description: Full-width dark header band at the top, no sidebar. Serif font, charcoal and gold palette. Best for senior or formal roles.

cover-modern.name: Modern Cover Letter
cover-modern.description: A contemporary cover letter with a sleek teal accent bar mirroring the Modern Professional resume. Clean and eye-catching.

cover-classic.name: Classic Cover Letter
cover-classic.description: A clean, traditional cover letter with a deep navy header. Pairs perfectly with the Classic Professional resume.

cover-executive.name: Executive Cover Letter
cover-executive.description: A commanding cover letter with charcoal header band and gold accent. Designed for senior leaders and C-suite roles.

cover-professional.name: Standard Cover Letter
cover-professional.description: A formal, business-appropriate cover letter with a minimal design. Choose from multiple accent color schemes.
